mapper.select: select * from user where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
select * from user where username = #{username} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: insert into user (username, password, nickname, phone, create_time) values (#{username}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{phone}, now())
mapper.update: update user set is_deleted = 1 where id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user WHERE is_deleted = 0
